title: Blessfulled
body:
At the moment, this mod adds 2 new visual features that gives life to Minecraft's combat system!


**_The mod must be installed on both the CLIENT and the SERVER._**


**[ Damage Text Popup Particles ]**

This feature adds an animated damage popup counter when a mob/player is hurt, accompanied with an onomatopoeia text expression! Damage counters may have different colors depending on the damage type. This feature is configurable.


**[ White Hurt Overlay ]**

This feature adds an animated white hurt overlay whenever a mob/player is hurt. This feature is configurable.
_As of current, this feature does not work with entity overlays such as armor._


This mod is still in the early stages of development, so bugs are expected. 

_- Modrinth Page is still currently in development. -_
